channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: King Charles highlights support for abuse victims in Congress address
item.description: King Charles III aimed to acknowledge victims of abuse during his recent address to the United States Congress, including those allegedly harmed by Jeffrey Epstein. In his speech, he emphasised the st...

item.title: Zondo Challenges PRASA Board Members’ Attempt to Overturn Corruption Findings
item.description: Former PRASA board members, including ex-CEO Lucky Montana, have been trying to overturn findings of corruption against them by the Zondo Commission. They argue they were not given a proper chance to ...

item.title: FIDA Encourages Bane Girls to Acquire AI Skills for Future Competitiveness
item.description: Di International Federation of Women Lawyers (FIDA) don call on Bane girls to embrace AI skills sharp-sharp, so dat dem fit compete for dis fast-changing world. Di chairperson of FIDA highlight say na...

item.title: Court hears case of fatal stabbing following Airbnb booking
item.description: A teenager has been charged with the fatal stabbing of a woman, an incident that reportedly occurred just hours after he booked her Airbnb property. The case has attracted attention due to the unusual...

item.title: PM urges review of tax concessions to address housing crisis and social inequality
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has stressed the importance of addressing social cohesion in light of Australia’s ongoing housing crisis. Ahead of the federal budget scheduled for May 12, Albanese is ...

item.title: Overview of Carney's Spring Economic Update and Key National Stories
item.description: Canada's spring economic update, led by Finance Minister François-Philippe Champagne, highlighted a smaller-than-expected federal deficit. While revenues are projected to rise, the government has earm...

item.title: Poems Reflecting on Loss, Grief and the Journey Towards Healing
item.description: This article presents an excerpt from Jayshree Misra Tripathi's poetry collection 'Morning Twilight: Poems', which explores themes of love, loss, grief, and personal renewal. Through verses such as 'H...

item.title: Joyce Omondi Showcases Her Dance Moves at EPIC Women Assembly
item.description: Former Rauka host Joyce Omondi recently hosted an EPIC Women assembly alongside her husband Waihiga Mwaura. The event, aimed at empowering and connecting women through faith, prayer, and community, wa...

item.title: US Evaluates Iran's New Proposal as Middle East Peace Talks Face Delay

item.title: Australia proposes levy on major tech firms to fund local journalism
item.description: The Australian government has introduced a proposal called the News Bargaining Incentive, which would charge major tech companies like Meta, Google, and TikTok a 2.25% levy on their local revenues unl...

item.title: Peace talks between the US and Iran stall as leadership issues complicate negotiations
item.description: Efforts to end the ongoing conflict between the US and Iran have hit a standstill. Former US President Donald Trump reportedly rejected Iran's latest peace proposal, which suggested delaying discussio...

item.title: VK Prasanth Seeks Re-election in Vattiyoorkavu Amid Three-Way Contest in Kerala Assembly Polls 2026

item.title: Taylor Swift expresses concern over fans overanalysing her song lyrics
item.description: Taylor Swift has spoken candidly about the pressures of having a highly engaged fanbase that intensely analyses her lyrics. In a recent interview with The New York Times Magazine, she compared some fa...

item.title: Police Confirm Identity of Nakuru Woman Found Dead in Likoni Residence
item.description: Police in Mombasa have confirmed that the young woman found dead in a rented house in Likoni is 21-year-old Fedelis Chepchumba from Nakuru County. Fedelis, a hospitality graduate from Sereini College,...

item.description: For PSG fans, last night na proper football feast as Paris Saint-Germain manage to edge Bayern Munich 5-4 for the first leg of their Champions League semi-final. The match for Parc des Princes carry n...

item.title: Bengal Election Officer Transferred After Dispute Involving Officer Nicknamed 'Singham'

item.title: PSG defeats Bayern Munich 5-4 in high-scoring Champions League semifinal first leg
item.description: In a thrilling and chaotic first leg of the UEFA Champions League semifinal at Parc des Princes, Paris Saint-Germain defeated Bayern Munich 5-4 on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The match featured nine goal...
